payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Large rectangular frameless wall-mounted mirror with a silvered reflective surface showing a door and tripod in reflection; appears slightly warped with visible rendering/artifacting and is edge-cropped at the top and sides — mounted above a sink about 1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"mirror","short_description":"large frameless wall mirror","long_description":"Large rectangular frameless wall-mounted mirror with a silvered reflective surface showing a door and tripod in reflection; appears slightly warped with visible rendering/artifacting and is edge-cropped at the top and sides — mounted above a sink about 1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["rectangular shape","frameless","wall-mounted","large size","reflective silvered glass","shows tripod reflection","shows door reflection","rendering artifacts/warping","edge-cropped at top and sides","installed above sink"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
